10:[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Building a Premium Bilingual Blog"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Welcome to the inaugural post on my technical blog. Today, I'm sharing the architectural decisions and styling techniques behind this very platform."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Why Next.js 16?"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Next.js 16 (App Router) provides a robust foundation for building high-performance, SEO-friendly applications. With ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"React Server Components (RSC)"}],", we can minimize client-side JavaScript, ensuring the blog remains lightning-fast."]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Internationalization (i18n)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Support for multiple languages is a first-class citizen here. I chose ",["$","code",null,{"children":"next-intl"}]," for its seamless integration with the App Router. The file structure follows the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[locale]"}]," pattern:"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"src/app/[locale]/\n  ├── layout.tsx\n  ├── page.tsx\n  └── blog/\n      └── [slug]/\n          └── page.tsx\n"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Styling with Tailwind CSS 4"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Tailwind CSS 4 introduces a new era of CSS-first configuration. Instead of a bulky ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tailwind.config.js"}],", we now use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@theme"}]," blocks directly in our CSS files."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Here's how I defined the premium typography scale:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-css","children":"@theme {\n  --font-sans: \"Inter\", \"Geist Sans\", sans-serif;\n  --font-mono: \"Fira Code\", monospace;\n}\n\n.text-gradient {\n  @apply bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600;\n}\n"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"MDX Integration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["I'm using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"next-mdx-remote"}]," to parse MDX files. This allows me to write posts in Markdown while having the flexibility to embed React components when needed."]}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"\"The best way to learn is to build and then share.\" — Developer Wisdom"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Features at a Glance"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Dark Mode"}],": Automatic detection and smooth transitions."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Typography"}],": Optimized for technical reading with Fira Code for code blocks."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Responsive"}],": Polished experience on mobile, tablet, and desktop."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Bilingual"}],": Seamless switching between English and Chinese."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Stay tuned for more deep dives into frontend engineering and system design!"}]]
